arts.ttl: Enzo Marseca to give Chelsea starlet Andrey Santos chance to impress in the Club World Cup after superb loan spell
arts.sum: Mail Sport can confirm the midfielder will have his chance to impress Maresca in two months' time as he will be selected to join the first-team squad in the United States for the FIFA tournament.

arts.sum: A host of Europe's top clubs reportedly discover the asking price of in-demand RB Leipzig striker Benjamin Sesko ahead of the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Chelsea man would be ‘delighted’ with transfer – Everyone wants the same thing
arts.sum: Chelsea forward Joao Felix would be ‘delighted’ to return to Benfica this summer and wants the move to happen. That’s according to Record, who report that the forward believes he can be a ‘valuable player’ at the Portuguese club and get his career back on track. Guirassy has enjoyed a sublime season at Dortmund, scoring 28 goals in 40 appearances across all competitions, but he is reportedly eager to “fulfil his dream of playing in the Premier League,” which has prompted rumours of Chelsea rekindling their interest this summer. Borussia Dortmund striker Serhou Guirassy “dreams” of playing in the Premier League at some point in his career, according to reports in Germany.
